title: lastrea crinita
intro: Lastrea crinita, also known as the Hair Fern or Crinita Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea crinita include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antioxidant and anti-aging agent. Herbal preparations of Lastrea crinita include tea, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the dried fronds in hot water or using them in a tincture.
